meta.description: 星座配对兼容性数据，score 为 1-5 分（5=天作之合，1=挑战重重）
meta.usage: 用 pair key 查找，key 格式为两个星座英文小写按字母序排列用 '-' 连接

zh.title: 灵魂伴侣
zh.description: 两个风象星座的结合充满了智慧的火花。你们都热爱自由和新鲜事物，对话永远不会无聊。彼此的独立性让这段关系轻松自在。

en.title: Soulmates
en.description: Two air signs create sparks of intellectual brilliance. You both love freedom and novelty, and conversations never get boring. Mutual independence keeps the relationship easy and breezy.

zh.title: 心意相通
zh.description: 风象三角的完美搭配。天秤座的优雅与水瓶座的独特相得益彰，你们在社交和理想追求上高度一致。

en.title: Kindred Spirits
en.description: A perfect air sign match. Libra's elegance complements Aquarius's uniqueness beautifully. You share social values and idealistic pursuits.

zh.title: 冒险搭档
zh.description: 你们都是自由的灵魂，对世界充满好奇。射手座的热情与水瓶座的创新精神让这段关系充满活力和可能性。

en.title: Adventure Partners
en.description: Both free spirits with boundless curiosity about the world. Sagittarius's passion and Aquarius's innovation fill this relationship with energy and possibilities.

zh.title: 热力四射
zh.description: 两个火象星座的碰撞产生耀眼的火花。你们都充满激情和自信，彼此欣赏对方的勇气和活力，是天生的一对。

en.title: Blazing Connection
en.description: Two fire signs colliding in a dazzling display. Both passionate and confident, you admire each other's courage and energy — a natural match.

zh.title: 志同道合
zh.description: 同为火象星座，你们对生活充满同样的热忱。一起冒险、一起追梦，这段关系充满欢笑和活力。

en.title: Kindred Fire
en.description: Fellow fire signs sharing the same passion for life. Adventuring and dreaming together, this relationship is full of laughter and vitality.

zh.title: 心有灵犀
zh.description: 两个水象星座的深度连接。你们不需要太多言语就能理解对方，感情深沉而细腻，家庭观念一致。

en.title: Intuitive Bond
en.description: A deep connection between two water signs. You understand each other without many words, with deep and tender emotions and shared family values.

zh.title: 灵魂深处
zh.description: 水象星座的绝配。你们都重视情感的深度，忠诚而专一。巨蟹的温暖融化天蝎的防备，这是一段刻骨铭心的感情。

en.title: Deep Souls
en.description: The ultimate water sign pairing. Both value emotional depth, loyalty, and devotion. Cancer's warmth melts Scorpio's walls — a profoundly moving love.

zh.title: 稳如磐石
zh.description: 土象星座的黄金搭配。你们都务实可靠，对生活有相同的追求。一起建设的生活扎实而有质感。

en.title: Rock Solid
en.description: The golden earth sign pairing. Both practical and reliable with shared life goals. Together you build a solid and quality life.

zh.title: 完美搭档
zh.description: 两个土象星座的强强联合。你们都注重细节和品质，工作和生活都能配合默契，是理想的人生伴侣。

en.title: Perfect Partners
en.description: A powerhouse earth sign union. Both detail-oriented and quality-focused, you work and live in perfect harmony — ideal life partners.

zh.title: 光芒万丈
zh.description: 火象星座的璀璨组合。狮子座的光芒与射手座的热情交相辉映，你们的生活充满戏剧性和浪漫。

en.title: Radiant Duo
en.description: A brilliant fire sign combination. Leo's radiance and Sagittarius's enthusiasm illuminate each other, filling life with drama and romance.

zh.title: 默契十足
zh.description: 风象星座的绝妙组合。你们的对话像一场优雅的舞蹈，在社交和艺术方面品味相投，关系轻松愉快。

en.title: Perfect Harmony
en.description: A wonderful air sign duo. Your conversations flow like an elegant dance, with shared tastes in socializing and art. An effortlessly delightful relationship.

zh.title: 深海之恋
zh.description: 两个水象星座的神秘结合。你们的感情如大海般深邃，直觉和感受力让你们无需言语就能心意相通。

en.title: Ocean Love
en.description: A mystical union of two water signs. Your love is as deep as the ocean, and your shared intuition creates a wordless understanding.

zh.title: 温馨之家
zh.description: 水象与土象的温暖结合。你们都重视家庭和安全感，金牛的踏实让巨蟹感到安心，巨蟹的温柔让金牛感到幸福。

en.title: Warm Home
en.description: A warm water-earth union. Both value family and security. Taurus's groundedness reassures Cancer, while Cancer's tenderness makes Taurus feel loved.

zh.title: 贴心关怀
zh.description: 水象与土象的温和搭配。你们都善于照顾人，细腻而体贴，在日常生活中能给对方最需要的关爱。

en.title: Tender Care
en.description: A gentle water-earth pairing. Both naturally caring, thoughtful, and attentive, providing each other with exactly the love needed in daily life.

zh.title: 强强联合
zh.description: 土象与水象的力量型组合。你们都有极强的意志力和目标感，共同努力能成就非凡的事业和感情。

en.title: Power Couple
en.description: A formidable earth-water combination. Both possess iron willpower and drive. Working together, you can achieve extraordinary things in life and love.

zh.title: 活力搭档
zh.description: 火象与风象的活泼组合。你们都精力充沛、热爱新鲜事物，相处时充满欢笑和刺激。

en.title: Dynamic Duo
en.description: A lively fire-air pairing. Both energetic and novelty-seeking, your time together is filled with laughter and excitement.

zh.title: 先锋组合
zh.description: 两个都不按常理出牌的星座。你们的关系充满创新和惊喜，彼此尊重对方的独立性。

en.title: Pioneer Pair
en.description: Two signs that play by their own rules. Your relationship is full of innovation and surprises, with mutual respect for independence.

zh.title: 华丽之恋
zh.description: 火象与风象的优雅组合。狮子的热情与天秤的魅力交融，你们是社交场上最耀眼的一对。

en.title: Glamorous Love
en.description: An elegant fire-air combination. Leo's passion blends with Libra's charm, making you the most dazzling couple in any social setting.

zh.title: 对立吸引
zh.description: 对宫星座的经典组合。你们互为镜像，差异带来吸引也带来挑战。学会欣赏彼此的不同是关键。

en.title: Opposites Attract
en.description: A classic opposing sign pairing. You mirror each other — differences create attraction but also challenges. Learning to appreciate your contrasts is key.

zh.title: 天涯旅伴
zh.description: 对宫星座的互补之旅。你们都热爱探索，只是方式不同——一个用头脑，一个用行动。

en.title: Fellow Travelers
en.description: An opposing sign journey of complementarity. Both love exploring, just differently — one through the mind, the other through action.

zh.title: 互补成长
zh.description: 对宫星座的平衡之道。巨蟹带来情感的温暖，摩羯带来物质的安全，若能互相理解便是绝配。

en.title: Complementary Growth
en.description: An opposing sign balance. Cancer brings emotional warmth, Capricorn brings material security. If you understand each other, it's a perfect match.

zh.title: 矛盾之美
zh.description: 对宫星座的碰撞。狮子追求个人光芒，水瓶关注群体利益，观点不同但能互相学习成长。

en.title: Beautiful Contradiction
en.description: Opposing signs collide. Leo seeks personal glory while Aquarius focuses on collective good. Different viewpoints, but mutual growth is possible.

zh.title: 梦与现实
zh.description: 对宫星座的交融。双鱼的浪漫与处女的务实看似矛盾，实际上可以完美互补，共同创造美好生活。

en.title: Dreams & Reality
en.description: Opposing signs merging. Pisces's romance and Virgo's practicality seem contradictory but can complement perfectly, creating a beautiful life together.

zh.title: 深度纠缠
zh.description: 对宫星座的浓烈关系。你们都极其执着和忠诚，感情强烈而深刻，但都很固执，需要学会妥协。

en.title: Deep Entanglement
en.description: An intense opposing sign relationship. Both incredibly devoted and loyal with strong, deep feelings, but stubbornness requires learning to compromise.

zh.title: 欢乐组合
zh.description: 火象与风象的快乐搭配。双子的幽默让狮子开心，狮子的慷慨让双子感动，你们在一起总是笑声不断。

en.title: Joyful Pair
en.description: A happy fire-air match. Gemini's humor delights Leo, Leo's generosity moves Gemini — together, laughter never stops.

zh.title: 梦想实践者
zh.description: 土象与水象的互补搭配。摩羯帮双鱼把梦想变成现实，双鱼为摩羯的生活增添柔情和诗意。

en.title: Dream Builders
en.description: A complementary earth-water match. Capricorn helps Pisces turn dreams into reality, while Pisces adds tenderness and poetry to Capricorn's life.

zh.title: 浪漫田园
zh.description: 水象与土象的诗意结合。你们都欣赏生活中的美好事物，金牛的稳定给了双鱼安全感，双鱼的浪漫丰富了金牛的世界。

en.title: Romantic Pastoral
en.description: A poetic water-earth union. Both appreciate beauty in life. Taurus's stability grounds Pisces, while Pisces's romance enriches Taurus's world.

zh.title: 深思熟虑
zh.description: 水象与土象的沉稳组合。你们都善于观察和分析，彼此欣赏对方的深度和认真态度。

en.title: Thoughtful Bond
en.description: A steady water-earth pairing. Both observant and analytical, you appreciate each other's depth and serious approach to life.

zh.title: 创意火花
zh.description: 火象与风象的创新搭配。你们都不墨守成规，一起做事总能碰撞出意想不到的创意。

en.title: Creative Sparks
en.description: An innovative fire-air match. Neither follows convention, and working together always produces unexpected creative breakthroughs.

zh.title: 优雅冒险
zh.description: 风象与火象的愉快组合。天秤的优雅与射手的奔放相辅相成，你们的约会总是充满惊喜。

en.title: Elegant Adventure
en.description: A delightful air-fire pairing. Libra's elegance and Sagittarius's exuberance complement each other, making every date full of surprises.

zh.title: 水火考验
zh.description: 火象与水象的碰撞。白羊的直率可能伤害巨蟹的敏感，巨蟹的情绪化可能让白羊感到束缚。需要大量的耐心和理解。

en.title: Fire & Water Test
en.description: Fire meets water. Aries's directness may hurt Cancer's sensitivity, and Cancer's moodiness may feel restricting to Aries. Requires great patience and understanding.

zh.title: 步调不同
zh.description: 白羊的冲劲与摩羯的沉稳节奏不太一致。一个要快，一个要稳，需要找到平衡点才能和谐。

en.title: Different Rhythms
en.description: Aries's rush and Capricorn's steady pace don't always align. One wants speed, the other stability — finding balance is essential for harmony.

zh.title: 观念碰撞
zh.description: 水瓶的前卫与金牛的传统形成鲜明对比。一个追求变化，一个渴望稳定，需要极大的包容性。

en.title: Clashing Values
en.description: Aquarius's progressiveness contrasts sharply with Taurus's tradition. One seeks change, the other craves stability — requires enormous tolerance.

zh.title: 冰与火
zh.description: 水瓶的理性与天蝎的感性难以调和。天蝎的深沉让水瓶感到压力，水瓶的疏离让天蝎感到不安。

en.title: Ice & Fire
en.description: Aquarius's rationality and Scorpio's intensity are hard to reconcile. Scorpio's depth pressures Aquarius, while Aquarius's detachment unsettles Scorpio.

zh.title: 温柔拉锯
zh.description: 两个都很温和的星座，但需求不同。巨蟹需要深度的情感连接，天秤追求社交和平衡，容易产生误解。

en.title: Gentle Tug-of-War
en.description: Two gentle signs with different needs. Cancer craves deep emotional connection while Libra seeks social balance — misunderstandings arise easily.

zh.title: 雾里看花
zh.description: 都是变动星座，但方式完全不同。双子靠理性分析，双鱼靠感觉直觉，沟通时常常不在一个频率。

en.title: Foggy View
en.description: Both mutable signs but with entirely different approaches. Gemini relies on logic, Pisces on intuition — you're often on different wavelengths.

zh.title: 水星兄弟
zh.description: 同为水星守护，但表达方式截然不同。双子的随性让处女焦虑，处女的挑剔让双子窒息。

en.title: Mercury Siblings
en.description: Both ruled by Mercury but with vastly different expressions. Gemini's casualness makes Virgo anxious, while Virgo's perfectionism suffocates Gemini.

zh.title: 王者之争
zh.description: 两个都有极强控制欲的星座。你们都骄傲而执着，在权力和注意力上容易产生竞争，但若能互相尊重则非常强大。

en.title: Battle of Wills
en.description: Two signs with powerful controlling tendencies. Both proud and determined, competition for power and attention is likely, but mutual respect creates an unbeatable team.

zh.title: 固执对决
zh.description: 两个固定星座的较量。你们都不愿意妥协，在生活方式和价值观上可能产生摩擦。

en.title: Stubborn Standoff
en.description: Two fixed signs face off. Neither willing to compromise, friction may arise over lifestyle choices and values.

zh.title: 梦与远方
zh.description: 都是理想主义者，但方向不同。射手追求外在的冒险，双鱼沉浸于内在的幻想，容易彼此失望。

en.title: Dreams & Horizons
en.description: Both idealists but in different directions. Sagittarius seeks outer adventure while Pisces dives into inner fantasy — mutual disappointment is common.

zh.title: 现实与理想
zh.description: 摩羯的严肃务实与天秤的优雅浪漫不太合拍。一个注重结果，一个注重过程，需要调和分歧。

en.title: Realism vs Idealism
en.description: Capricorn's serious pragmatism and Libra's elegant romance don't always gel. One focuses on results, the other on the journey — bridging the gap is key.

zh.title: 细节与宏观
zh.description: 处女座的细致与射手座的粗犷形成对比。一个关注细节，一个着眼全局，需要互相欣赏对方的优点。

en.title: Detail vs Big Picture
en.description: Virgo's meticulousness contrasts with Sagittarius's boldness. One focuses on details, the other on the big picture — appreciating each other's strengths is essential.

zh.title: 勇者与梦者
zh.description: 白羊的果敢与双鱼的温柔形成有趣的组合。若白羊能放慢脚步，双鱼能更坚强，便能互相成就。

en.title: Warrior & Dreamer
en.description: An intriguing combo of Aries's boldness and Pisces's gentleness. If Aries slows down and Pisces toughens up, you can truly empower each other.

zh.title: 快与慢
zh.description: 白羊的急性子与处女的慢工出细活经常冲突。白羊觉得处女太磨蹭，处女觉得白羊太粗糙。

en.title: Fast & Slow
en.description: Aries's impatience and Virgo's meticulous pace often clash. Aries finds Virgo too slow, Virgo finds Aries too rough.

zh.title: 火星战士
zh.description: 都与火星有关的两个星座，充满激情和力量。关系强烈而激烈，既能是最好的盟友也能是最强的对手。

en.title: Mars Warriors
en.description: Two Mars-connected signs full of passion and power. The relationship is intense — you can be the best allies or the fiercest rivals.

zh.title: 开拓与守护
zh.description: 白羊的冒险精神与金牛的稳健形成互补。一个负责开拓，一个负责守护成果，配合得当则非常高效。

en.title: Pioneer & Guardian
en.description: Aries's adventurousness and Taurus's steadiness complement each other. One pioneers, the other guards the gains — great efficiency when aligned.

zh.title: 自由与归属
zh.description: 水瓶追求自由与独立，巨蟹渴望归属与陪伴。这两种需求经常产生矛盾，需要极大的理解和妥协。

en.title: Freedom vs Belonging
en.description: Aquarius seeks freedom and independence, Cancer craves belonging and companionship. These conflicting needs require tremendous understanding and compromise.

zh.title: 传统与革新
zh.description: 都由土星关联的星座。摩羯尊重传统，水瓶追求革新，若能找到平衡点便能开创全新的可能。

en.title: Tradition & Innovation
en.description: Both Saturn-connected signs. Capricorn respects tradition, Aquarius pursues innovation. Finding balance opens entirely new possibilities.

zh.title: 理想国
zh.description: 都是关注人类集体的星座。水瓶用理性改变世界，双鱼用感性温暖世界，目标相同但路径不同。

en.title: Utopia
en.description: Both concerned with the collective. Aquarius changes the world through logic, Pisces warms it through emotion — same goal, different paths.

zh.title: 思维碰撞
zh.description: 两个都很聪明但思考方式不同。水瓶是宏观创新者，处女是微观完美主义者，容易互相看不惯。

en.title: Mental Clash
en.description: Both brilliant but think differently. Aquarius innovates big-picture, Virgo perfects details — mutual frustration is common.

zh.title: 心与脑
zh.description: 巨蟹用心感受世界，双子用脑分析世界。情感型与理智型的碰撞需要更多的耐心和沟通。

en.title: Heart & Mind
en.description: Cancer feels the world through emotions, Gemini analyzes it through intellect. This emotional-rational collision needs extra patience and communication.

zh.title: 月光与阳光
zh.description: 巨蟹的温柔如月光，狮子的热情如阳光。若狮子能给巨蟹安全感，巨蟹能给狮子赞美，关系可以很美。

en.title: Moonlight & Sunshine
en.description: Cancer's tenderness like moonlight, Leo's passion like sunshine. If Leo provides security and Cancer offers admiration, the relationship can be beautiful.

zh.title: 家与远方
zh.description: 巨蟹渴望温暖的家，射手向往远方的路。一个想安定，一个想自由，需要找到家与远方的平衡。

en.title: Home & Horizon
en.description: Cancer yearns for a warm home, Sagittarius for the open road. One wants to settle, the other to roam — finding balance between home and horizon is crucial.

zh.title: 严肃与玩味
zh.description: 摩羯的严肃认真与双子的轻松幽默形成反差。摩羯觉得双子不够认真，双子觉得摩羯太无趣。

en.title: Serious & Playful
en.description: Capricorn's seriousness and Gemini's playfulness create a stark contrast. Capricorn finds Gemini flippant, Gemini finds Capricorn dull.

zh.title: 权力之争
zh.description: 两个都有野心和领导欲的星座。在谁主导的问题上容易产生分歧，但若目标一致则是最强的战队。

en.title: Power Struggle
en.description: Two ambitious, leadership-oriented signs. Disagreements over who leads are common, but when goals align, you're the ultimate power team.

zh.title: 表与里
zh.description: 双子活在表面的热闹中，天蝎沉浸在内心的深海里。轻浮与深沉的碰撞，需要彼此走出舒适区。

en.title: Surface & Depths
en.description: Gemini thrives on the surface, Scorpio dives deep within. This clash of lightness and intensity requires both to step outside their comfort zones.

zh.title: 风与土
zh.description: 双子的善变与金牛的稳定形成反差。一个喜欢新鲜感，一个追求安全感，节奏上需要互相适应。

en.title: Wind & Earth
en.description: Gemini's changeability and Taurus's stability contrast sharply. One craves novelty, the other security — adjusting to each other's rhythm is key.

zh.title: 王子与公主
zh.description: 一个是耀眼的王者，一个是梦幻的浪漫家。狮子的自信保护双鱼的脆弱，双鱼的柔情满足狮子的需要被崇拜。

en.title: King & Dreamer
en.description: One is a dazzling ruler, the other a dreamy romantic. Leo's confidence protects Pisces's vulnerability, and Pisces's adoration satisfies Leo's need to be admired.

zh.title: 聚光灯与幕后
zh.description: 狮子爱站在舞台中央，处女喜欢在幕后默默付出。价值观和生活方式的差异需要更多理解。

en.title: Spotlight & Backstage
en.description: Leo loves center stage, Virgo prefers working quietly behind the scenes. Differences in values and lifestyle need extra understanding.

zh.title: 浪漫双重奏
zh.description: 两个都追求美和浪漫的星座。你们的世界充满了艺术和诗意，但在面对现实问题时可能都不太擅长。

en.title: Romantic Duet
en.description: Two signs that pursue beauty and romance. Your world is full of art and poetry, but both may struggle when facing practical matters.

zh.title: 优雅与深沉
zh.description: 天秤的轻盈优雅与天蝎的浓烈深沉形成对比。天秤追求和谐避免冲突，天蝎偏要直面一切。

en.title: Grace & Depth
en.description: Libra's airy elegance contrasts with Scorpio's intense depth. Libra seeks harmony and avoids conflict, while Scorpio insists on confronting everything.

zh.title: 金星之子
zh.description: 同为金星守护的星座，都热爱美好事物。你们在审美和享受生活方面很合拍，但处理方式不尽相同。

en.title: Children of Venus
en.description: Both ruled by Venus, sharing a love of beauty. You're well-matched in aesthetics and enjoying life, though your approaches may differ.

zh.title: 追求完美
zh.description: 两个都对生活品质有高要求的星座。在美学和秩序方面能产生共鸣，但标准可能不尽相同。

en.title: Pursuit of Perfection
en.description: Two signs with high standards for life quality. You resonate on aesthetics and order, though your specific standards may differ.

zh.title: 深与广
zh.description: 天蝎追求深度，射手追求广度。一个要深入探索，一个要纵横四海，很难在同一个节奏上。

en.title: Depth & Breadth
en.description: Scorpio pursues depth, Sagittarius seeks breadth. One wants to dig deep, the other to roam far — staying in sync is the challenge.

zh.title: 冲锋与谋略
zh.description: 白羊是冲锋的勇士，摩羯是运筹帷幄的将军。行事风格的差异既是互补也是摩擦的来源。

en.title: Charge & Strategy
en.description: Aries charges ahead, Capricorn strategizes from behind. Different operating styles are both complementary and a source of friction.

zh.title: 情感与理性
zh.description: 巨蟹以情感为导向，水瓶以理性为主导。在情感表达和生活方式上有较大差异。

en.title: Emotion & Logic
en.description: Cancer is emotionally driven, Aquarius is logically guided. Significant differences in emotional expression and lifestyle.

zh.title: 蝴蝶与山羊
zh.description: 双子的灵动多变与摩羯的沉稳坚定截然不同。生活态度的差异需要双方共同努力去理解。

en.title: Butterfly & Mountain Goat
en.description: Gemini's lively changeability and Capricorn's solid determination are worlds apart. Bridging the lifestyle gap requires effort from both sides.
